derivedFrom: T1 site-schema contracts: trustBar.items >=6 real facts, valueProps exactly 3, leadForm.endpoint external https, ctaPrimary tel: + ctaSecondary sms:, offers quantified, financing optional, analytics GA4 + optional ads config
brief.json seed facts: Pita Kabab, 3100 6th St SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404, restaurant, single location, same owner as Captains Fish and Chicken (address formerly Captains)

probes.question: Confirm NAP (name, address, phone), hours of operation, maps/directions, and record source disagreements per-source.
Confirm cuisine type (name suggests Middle Eastern/Mediterranean kabab) and service model (dine-in / carryout / delivery / catering). Not owner-confirmed in the brief.
Discover the menu / service list (items, categories, catering) for the restaurant page family and the lead-form services dropdown. Aggregator prices are NOT owner prices.
Verify web sources still attribute 3100 6th St SW to Captains Fish and Chicken (former tenant, same owner) and record stale-listing discrepancies needing cleanup.
Locate logo, brand colors, and usable photography (interior, food). Never fabricate brand assets.

Find at least SIX genuine trust facts (years in business, ratings/review counts, certifications, awards, press mentions, halal certification if real). Omit the trust grid below six facts; never invent filler.

Gather owner-articulated copy: exactly 3 hero value-props and a real mid-page CTA-banner headline. Web review themes may inform drafts but owner must confirm; page kind fails the gate until copy exists.
Find any current QUANTIFIED promotion (e.g. '$X off', 'free drink with combo') with validFrom/validThrough dates. No promotion => omit site.offers.
Probe for financing partners (unlikely for a restaurant; catering deposits possible). No financing => omit site.financing.
Determine whether an external static-form endpoint (e.g. Web3Forms https URL) exists or must be provisioned. REQUIRED for a lead form to ship; static site must never post to a first-party handler.
Capture the services-dropdown options (e.g. catering inquiry, large orders) and preferred contact channels (call / text / email) for the lead form.
Determine the callable phone number (tel:) AND whether that or another number can receive SMS (sms:). Both required for the dual-CTA; never invent a channel.
Determine GA4 property/measurement id and, only if the owner runs Google Ads, the conversion id + leadForm/telClick labels. Absent => GA4-only.
Determine the intended domain, business email, and hosting/registrar situation. Never invent domains or emails.
Determine accepted payment methods and any payment policy (cash/card, online ordering).

Confirm single-location scope; restaurant archetype uses menu/page families rather than service-area SAP pages. If any service-area towns are later declared, each needs >=1 localFact, >=2 proximityTrustLines, >=1 townFaq or it folds.
Determine domain, email, GA id, payment policy, or declared identity fixtures if real values are unavailable.
